b.statement: **Optional:** A least-privileged, role and attribute-based, and just-in-time access authorization model is used and persistently reviewed for access to log data based on organizationally defined data sensitivity.

c.statement: A least-privileged, role and attribute-based, and just-in-time access authorization model is used and persistently reviewed for access to log data based on organizationally defined data sensitivity.

KSI-MLA-EVC.name: Evaluating Configurations
KSI-MLA-EVC.statement: The configuration of machine-based information resources, especially infrastructure as code, is persistently evaluated and tested.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-MLA-LET.name: Logging Event Types
KSI-MLA-LET.statement: A list of information resources and event types that will be logged, monitored, and audited is maintained and persistently reviewed to ensure these activities occur.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-MLA-OSM.name: Operating SIEM Capability
KSI-MLA-OSM.statement: A Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) or similar system(s) is used and persistently reviewed for centralized, tamper-resistant logging of events, activities, and changes.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-MLA-RVL.name: Reviewing Logs
KSI-MLA-RVL.statement: Logs are persistently reviewed and audited.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-PIY-GIV.name: Generating Inventories
KSI-PIY-GIV.statement: Authoritative sources are used to automatically generate real-time inventories of all information resources when needed.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-PIY-RES.name: Reviewing Executive Support
KSI-PIY-RES.statement: Executive support for achieving the provider's security goals is persistently reviewed and demonstrated.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-PIY-RIS.name: Reviewing Investments in Security
KSI-PIY-RIS.statement: The effectiveness of the provider's investments in achieving security goals is persistently reviewed.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-PIY-RSD.name: Reviewing Security in the SDLC
KSI-PIY-RSD.statement: The effectiveness of building security and privacy considerations into the Software Development Lifecycle and aligning with CISA Secure By Design principles is persistently reviewed.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-PIY-RVD.name: Reviewing Vulnerability Disclosures
KSI-PIY-RVD.statement: The effectiveness of the provider's vulnerability disclosure program is persistently reviewed.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-RPL-ABO.name: Aligning Backups with Objectives
KSI-RPL-ABO.statement: The alignment of machine-based information resource backups with defined recovery objectives is persistently reviewed.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-RPL-ARP.name: Aligning Recovery Plan
KSI-RPL-ARP.statement: The alignment of recovery plans with defined recovery objectives is persistently reviewed.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-RPL-RRO.name: Reviewing Recovery Objectives
KSI-RPL-RRO.statement: The desired Recovery Time Objectives (RTO) and Recovery Point Objectives (RPO) are persistently reviewed for alignment with the provider's business needs and capabilities.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-RPL-TRC.name: Testing Recovery Capabilities
KSI-RPL-TRC.statement: The capability to recover from incidents and contingencies aligned with defined recovery objectives is persistently tested.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-SVC-ACM.name: Automating Configuration Management
KSI-SVC-ACM.statement: The configuration of machine-based information resources is managed using automation and persistently reviewed for drift.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-SVC-ASM.name: Automating Secret Management
KSI-SVC-ASM.statement: Management, protection, and regular rotation of digital keys, certificates, and other secrets is automated and persistently reviewed.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-SVC-EIS.name: Evaluating and Improving Security
KSI-SVC-EIS.statement: Implement improvements based on persistent evaluation of information resources for opportunities to improve security.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.
Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

b.statement: **Optional:** Plans, procedures, and the state of information resources are persistently reviewed after making changes to limit and remove unwanted residual elements that would likely negatively affect the confidentiality, integrity, or availability of federal customer data.

c.statement: Plans, procedures, and the state of information resources are persistently reviewed after making changes to limit and remove unwanted residual elements that would likely negatively affect the confidentiality, integrity, or availability of federal customer data.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

b.statement: **Optional:** Unwanted federal customer data is removed promptly when requested by an agency in alignment with customer agreements, including from backups if appropriate; this typically applies when a customer spills information or when a customer seeks to remove information from a service due to a change in usage.

c.statement: Unwanted federal customer data is removed promptly when requested by an agency in alignment with customer agreements, including from backups if appropriate; this typically applies when a customer spills information or when a customer seeks to remove information from a service due to a change in usage.

KSI-SVC-SNT.name: Securing Network Traffic
KSI-SVC-SNT.statement: Encrypt or otherwise secure network traffic.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.
Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

b.statement: **Optional:** The authenticity and integrity of communications between machine-based information resources is persistently validated using automation.

c.statement: The authenticity and integrity of communications between machine-based information resources is persistently validated using automation.

KSI-SVC-VRI.name: Validating Resource Integrity
KSI-SVC-VRI.statement: Use cryptographic methods to validate the integrity of machine-based information resources.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-SCR-MIT.name: Mitigating Supply Chain Risk
KSI-SCR-MIT.statement: Persistently identify, review, and mitigate potential supply chain risks.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.

KSI-SCR-MON.name: Monitoring Supply Chain Risk
KSI-SCR-MON.statement: Third party software information resources are automatically monitored for upstream vulnerabilities using mechanisms that may include contractual notification requirements or active monitoring services.

updated.comment: Revisited and baselined against the Consolidated Rules for 2026.
